calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-24-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JONATHAN NGUYUEN, Esq. of the California Department of Justice (Tel: 213-269-6434) for Respondent Medical Board of California;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER EMMANUEL AYODELE's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

The Court calls the matter.

The Court notes there is no appearance by petitioner's counsel.

The Court emails a tentative ruling to counsel for parties, and passes the matter.

The Court re-calls the matter.

The Court notes there is still no appearance by petitioner's counsel.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling to deny petitioner's writ of administative mandate, and signs an order to that effect.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
